title: Resolution authorizing the Municipal Treasurer, Mr. Alexander L. Bejosano in behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to enter and sign a Memorandum of Agreement with Land Bank of the Philippines UPLB Branch for the opening of a new Trust Fund for the Department of Finance-Municipal Development Fund Office- Disaster Management Assistance (DFO-MDF-DMA) for the construction of the Evacuation/Multi-Purpose Center in Brgy. Baybayin, Los Baños, Laguna.
